generationNotes: TestGen emits integration, e2e (API), and browser (MCP checklist) layers only. Executable Playwright UI specs in tests/playwright-ui/scenarios/ are owned by the browser test agent codegen step — do not duplicate Playwright UI automation as layer:e2e cases in TestGen artifacts.

coverageHints: browser-journey: open UserMenu → identity panel shows displayName, email, institutionalId, role (AC-02e)
browser-journey: select Đăng xuất → lands on /login; /auth/me returns 401 (AC-02d)
browser-journey: login redirect with returnUrl preserved (AC-02a/b)
browser-journey: session expired toast on protected route (AC-02c)
component: UserMenu renders identity fields and logout item with data-testids
integration: POST /auth/logout 204 + cookie cleared (TC-FR-02-009)
browser-journey: logout from student, instructor, and admin shells
integration: POST /users/import upsert — create new student, update existing by institutional_id (AC-01d)
integration: CSV row DuplicateEmail when email belongs to different institutional_id (AC-01g)
integration: institutional ID with underscore and period accepted (AC-01f)
integration: roster CSV row with institutional_id containing _ or . accepted under VAL-05
integration: roster import updates display_name only on existing user — not email, role, or password
browser-journey: /admin/users/import upload → preview → summary with created/updated counts
integration: POST /classes and POST /subjects create reference records with uppercase code validation
integration: GET /classes and GET /subjects return paginated catalog (AC-03i)
integration: duplicate class code returns DuplicateClassCode with localized error
integration: duplicate subject code returns DuplicateSubjectCode (AC-03g)
integration: CSV import with two classes sharing one subject code succeeds (AC-03h)
browser-journey: /admin/classes list + /admin/classes/new create class HESD-03 (AC-03d)
browser-journey: /admin/subjects list + /admin/subjects/new create subject SWE-102 (AC-03f)

browser-journey: scan step does not mount gps-capture-step until preflight passes

e2e: gpsSim params ignored when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false

rbac-negative: student export rejected with localized message; no export control visible (AC-13b)
